text:
Once upon a time, there was a bunny named Bertie who lived in a world filled with colorful flowers and peaceful meadows. One sunny day, Bertie decided to build himself a cozy little sanctuary right behind an old oak tree. With soft leaves as his carpet, he dug a burrow that crawled right into the heartwood. He filled his burrow with apples and carrots, some cheese, and even a plush toy rabbit named Lily.

One adventurous afternoon, Bertie heard about a mysterious forest glade where flowers could sing. Determined to discover this musical wonderland, he ventured deeper. The glade was enchanting! The flowers sang different tunes that made Bertie feel like he was floating. He danced among them until night fell, singing softly to Lily.

That night, Bertie dreamed of singing flowers. When he woke up next day, he had an idea! He began to sing songs about trees and forests. Over time, his songs spread through the forest, captivating every creature
